description_long: This house is a modern, multi-structure residential complex with a central building surrounded by landscaped green areas and several smaller outbuildings. The main structure features clean, rectilinear lines, flat roofs, and large windows, giving it a contemporary architectural style. The property is bordered by paved driveways and walkways, with trees and shrubs providing natural accents along the perimeter. The arrangement of the buildings suggests multiple entry points and a focus on both privacy and communal outdoor spaces. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with some darker accents and transparent window elements. The overall layout integrates the house with its urban surroundings, including adjacent streets and neighboring structures.
description: A modern, multi-structure house complex with flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped green areas, surrounded by paved driveways and walkways.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main house with its landscaped front yard, flanked by trees and shrubs, and a long driveway extending to the left.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the central courtyard and the arrangement of outbuildings, with visible green spaces and paved paths connecting the structures.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear of the house, showing the back driveway, additional outbuildings, and a long green strip along the right side.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a top-down perspective of the entire property, emphasizing the layout of the buildings, green areas, and the integration with surrounding streets.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a minimalist door, small steps, and is framed by landscaping and a paved approach.
